case_title: LYCHOCK, MICHAEL VS CHRISTIE, BRUCE et al

docket_entries.description: AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY LYCHOCK, MICHAEL AS TO DEFENDANT CHRISTIE, BRUCE SVENHARD, RONNY SVENHARD'S SWEDISH BAKERY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-30-2005 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT SVENHARD, RONNY
LETTER FROM MARY CHRISTIE, HR MANAGER, REQUESTING STATUS OF TRIAL OUTCOME.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LYCHOCK, MICHAEL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CHRISTIE, BRUCE SVENHARD, RONNY $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $101.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,101.50, SVENHARD'S SWEDISH BAKERY IS ADDED AS A DEFT IN THIS CASE. DEFENDANT HAVE JOINT AND SEVERAL LIABILITY. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT CHRISTIE, BRUCE SVENHARD, RONNY SVENHARD'S SWEDISH BAKERY
